name: 0necontext
description: Build and load the AI's context layer — the architectural memory of who {PRINCIPAL_NAME} is, what his business is, and how it operates. USE WHEN /0neContext, /0neContext build, /0neContext commitments, build my context, build context, context interview, north star, master prompt, business brain, business framework, customer lifecycle map, process assessment, RACI map, AI-fy my commitments, inventory my commitments, list my commitments, build my commitments, turn my commitments into projects, OR for substantive work that needs business context, strategy context, personal context, thought partnering, 1-3-1 decisions, marketing, campaigns, offer docs, planning, goal setting, business decisions, pricing, competitors, ICP analysis, team discussions, fulfillment, process improvement.
